Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Pending Action
Off Calendar Feb-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeffrey A. Baruh, Esq. of Adleson Hess & Kelly, T:408.341.0234, for defendants/moving party, on Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: Mr. Baruh argues/discusses defendants' request for attorney's fees which was not addressed in the tentative ruling. At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS LUKE STICKNEY, TIMOTHY VINSON, LOT 1, PLAYA DEL REY, CABO BELLA, LLC, AND LUXURY ESTATES GROUP, LLC'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Pending Action is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendants' request for attorney's fees is taken under submission.
